title: senecillis platyglossa
intro: Senecillis platyglossa, also known as the ground pine or broom fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Senecillis platyglossa include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting liver function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and its leaves and stems are often used in traditional medicine.
